title: Provider interface + manifest types
definition_of_done: Provider interface, SourceEntry, Manifest types with Marshal/Unmarshal/Get/Upsert; TestManifestRoundTrip passes
outcome: Created internal/sources/types.go with Provider interface, SourceEntry, Manifest (Get/Upsert/Marshal/Unmarshal); TestManifestRoundTrip passes

notes.msg: Implemented internal/sources/types.go: SourceEntry struct (ID, URL, Title, Fingerprint, LastSynced, ProviderType with JSON tags), Manifest struct with Get/Upsert/Marshal/Unmarshal methods, and Provider interface (Fetch/Type). TestManifestRoundTrip passes. go test ./internal/sources/... and go build ./... both pass.
